funder.name: Spanish Ministry of Economy and Competitiveness

message.abstract:
<jats:p>Retraction: Maté Sánchez de Val <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">JE</jats:styled-content>, Calvo Guirado <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">JL</jats:styled-content>, Ramírez Fernández <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">MP</jats:styled-content>, Delgado Ruiz <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">RA</jats:styled-content>, Mazón P, De Aza <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">PN</jats:styled-content>. In vivo behavior of hydroxyapatite/β‐<jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">TCP</jats:styled-content>/collagen scaffold in animal model. Histological, histomorphometrical, radiological, and <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">SEM</jats:styled-content> analysis at 15, 30, and 60 days. <jats:italic>Clin Oral Impl Res</jats:italic>.</jats:p><jats:p>The above article, published online on August 7, 2015, in Wiley Online Library (wileyonlinelibrary.com) has been retracted by agreement between the journal editor‐in‐chief, L Heitz‐Mayfield, and John Wiley & Sons Ltd. The retraction has been agreed due to image discrepancies resulting in unreliable data. It has not been possible to prove the validity of the images. Images in Figure 4 have been used in other publications representing different time points and materials. Images within Figure 4 have been manipulated to represent different time points and materials.</jats:p><jats:p>
<jats:bold>Reference</jats:bold>
</jats:p><jats:p>Maté Sánchez de Val <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">JE</jats:styled-content>, Calvo Guirado <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">JL</jats:styled-content>, Ramírez Fernández <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">MP</jats:styled-content>, Delgado Ruiz <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">RA</jats:styled-content>, Mazón P, De Aza <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">PN</jats:styled-content>. In vivo behavior of hydroxyapatite/β‐<jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">TCP</jats:styled-content>/collagen scaffold in animal model. Histological, histomorphometrical, radiological, and <jats:styled-content style="fixed-case">SEM</jats:styled-content> analysis at 15, 30, and 60 days. <jats:italic>Clin Oral Impl Res</jats:italic>. <jats:ext-link xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xlink:href="https://doi.org/10.1111/clr.12656">https://doi.org/10.1111/clr.12656</jats:ext-link></jats:p>
title: Retracted: In vivo behavior of hydroxyapatite/β‐TCP/collagen scaffold in animal model. Histological, histomorphometrical, radiological, and SEM analysis at 15, 30, and 60 days
